event: View of Anga Church on Gotland, Sweden
description: A photograph of a small medieval Romanesque stone church set against a blue sky with scattered clouds. The church has a white limestone tower with a pointed dark roof and narrow arched windows. The main nave has a steep dark roof with a smaller attached structure to the right. The church stands on a grassy area with a low stone wall visible in the foreground. The architecture is typical of medieval Gotlandic churches with thick stone walls and simple, sturdy proportions.
